---
title: "Andrea's Marketing Portfolio"
subtitle: "Proposal Presentation"
author: "Andrea Ponce"
institute: "IBM 3202, Cal Poly Pomona"
date: "today"
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: serif
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    footer: Marketing Portfolio Project
    transition: slide
    transition-speed: default
    incremental: false
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 1
    slide-number: true
    scrollable: true
    smaller: true
    code-fold: false
    code-overflow: wrap
    number-sections: false
    number-depth: 5
    embed-resources: true
    css: styles.css
editor: visual
execute: 
  echo: true
  freeze: auto
---

# Home Page

-   Introduction
-   Personal statement
-   Brief overview of my background
-   Professional photo

::: {.notes}
Explain that this page will include a short biography, a professional photo, and a summary of my marketing interests.
:::

# Purpose

This website will present my marketing projects, campaign performance results, and internship experience.^[Including examples and performance data from my second internship.]

# Marketing Projects

::: {.incremental}

- Performance metrics
- Internship marketing work
- Real campaign results
- Portfolio graphics

:::

# Dashboard

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

### Data Visualizations

- Charts
- Campaign performance

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

### Insights

- Engagement metrics
- Data insights
- Examples from my second internship

:::

::::

# Revealjs Presentation

This section of the website would include presentations created using Quarto and Revealjs.

::: {.fragment}
Project proposal presentations
:::

::: {.fragment}
Marketing analysis presentations
:::

::: {.fragment}
Data visualization slides
:::

::: {.fragment}
Research or case study presentations
:::

# Google Analytics

This page would showcase my experience with Google Analytics and website data.

::: {.fragment}
- Traffic reports
:::

::: {.fragment}
- Audience insights
:::

::: {.fragment}
- Engagement metrics
:::

::: {.fragment}
- Conversion analysis
:::

::: {.fragment}
- Google Analytics certifications
:::
